_meta.note: Open WebUI filter pipeline definitions. Actual pipeline code is Sprint 1.1.

filters.name: Thinking Mode Injector
filters.description: Detects /think and /nothink prefixes; injects extra_body.thinking into request

filters.name: RPM Budget Guard
filters.description: Tracks request count; blocks or warns when approaching 40 RPM or 1,000/day

filters.name: Memory Context Injector
filters.description: Loads user memory and injects into system context per memory_loading_strategy.md

filters.name: Dynamic Profile Selector
filters.description: Detects intent and switches active parameter profile dynamically
